quotes: WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold.
**Test contrast levels** (webaim.com or equivalent) for every text/background pair.
[GENERAL minimums: WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold.]

rules.intent: Ensure every text treatment remains legible and meets the stated WCAG AA contrast thresholds.
rules.rule_text: Test every text/background pair with WebAIM or an equivalent tool. Meet WCAG AA minimums using body.contrast.minimum = 4.5:1 and large_text.contrast.minimum = 3:1 for large text at least 24px or 19px bold.

quotes: Known-safe pairs: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, Graphite on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy.
**Avoid:** Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

rules.intent: Keep palette applications legible while reserving low-contrast golds for appropriate non-body-text uses.
rules.rule_text: Use the documented known-safe pairings: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, or Graphite text on White, Light Blue, or Golden Sand; and White text on Brand Blue, Deep Blue, or Dark Navy. Do not place Gold (#ffc60a) or Sunshine (#faa31b) text on White. Golds are reserved for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis.

quotes: **Don't rely on color alone** to convey meaning — pair with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.

rules.intent: Ensure meaning remains understandable when color distinctions are unavailable or difficult to perceive.
rules.rule_text: Do not rely on color alone to convey meaning; pair color with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.
